label: Economic
definition: Costs benefits or other financial implications

label: Capacity and resources
definition: Availability or lack of time money personnel or infrastructure

label: Fairness and equality
definition: Equality or inequality of treatment rights or outcomes

label: Legality, constitutionality and jurisprudence
definition: Rights freedoms legal authority and court interpretation

label: Policy prescription and evaluation
definition: Whether an existing or proposed policy works or is recommended

label: Crime and punishment
definition: Effectiveness and implications of law enforcement and penalties

label: Security and defense
definition: Threats to the nation community or individuals

label: Health and safety
definition: Health care public health and safety hazards

label: Quality of life
definition: Effects on daily life community character and wellbeing

label: Cultural identity
definition: Traditions customs heritage and social norms of a group

label: Public opinion
definition: Reference to general social attitudes or polling

label: Political
definition: Considerations of political gain partisanship or process

label: External regulation and reputation
definition: Reputation or relations with other jurisdictions or external bodies

label: Other
definition: Any coherent argument that does not fit the other frames
